heading: Ocean discharge criteria
label: 1343 Ocean discharge criteria
notes: Discharges From Point Sources in United States Virgin Islands Attributable to Manufacture of Rum; Exemption; ConditionsDischarges from point sources in the United States Virgin Islands in existence on , attributable to the manufacture of rum not to be subject to the requirements of this section under certain conditions, see , set out as a note under .Aug. 5, 1983section 214(g) of Pub. L. 98–67section 1311 of this title

Territorial Sea and Contiguous Zone of United StatesFor extension of territorial sea and contiguous zone of United States, see Proc. No. 5928 and Proc. No. 7219, respectively, set out as notes under , Public Lands.section 1331 of Title 43

children.heading: Issuance of permits
children.label: a Issuance of permits
children.text: No permit under for a discharge into the territorial sea, the waters of the contiguous zone, or the oceans shall be issued, after promulgation of guidelines established under subsection (c) of this section, except in compliance with such guidelines. Prior to the promulgation of such guidelines, a permit may be issued under such if the Administrator determines it to be in the public interest.section 1342 of this titlesection 1342 of this title

children.heading: Waiver
children.label: b Waiver
children.text: The requirements of subsection (d) of may not be waived in the case of permits for discharges into the territorial sea.section 1342 of this title

children.heading: Guidelines for determining degradation of waters
children.label: c Guidelines for determining degradation of waters
A
children.text: the effect of disposal of pollutants on human health or welfare, including but not limited to plankton, fish, shellfish, wildlife, shorelines, and beaches;

children.label: B
children.text: the effect of disposal of pollutants on marine life including the transfer, concentration, and dispersal of pollutants or their byproducts through biological, physical, and chemical processes; changes in marine ecosystem diversity, productivity, and stability; and species and community population changes;

children.label: C
children.text: the effect of disposal, of pollutants on esthetic, recreation, and economic values;

children.label: D
children.text: the persistence and permanence of the effects of disposal of pollutants;

children.label: E
children.text: the effect of the disposal of varying rates, of particular volumes and concentrations of pollutants;

children.label: F
children.text: other possible locations and methods of disposal or recycling of pollutants including land-based alternatives; and

children.label: G
children.text: the effect on alternate uses of the oceans, such as mineral exploitation and scientific study.

In any event where insufficient information exists on any proposed discharge to make a reasonable judgment on any of the guidelines established pursuant to this subsection no permit shall be issued under .section 1342 of this title
